qualification_chain.explain: Iran (1615 pts) needs to win Group G ahead of Belgium, Egypt, NZ.
They must lose the top-2 spots in their group to two other teams.

qualification_chain.step: Group E's 3rd-place team qualifies in best-8 AND is assigned to face 1G
qualification_chain.explain: Among 12 groups' 3rd-placed teams, only 8 advance. Annex C of FIFA's regs then maps each combo to which group winners face which 3rd-place team.
